creator: asami@FreeBSD.org
text:
Popclient doesn't check exit status of /usr/libexec/mail.local
	(or mail.local is returning bogus exit status) so when the local
	mailbox is not writable, the remote mails still get flushed, 
	resulting in loss of messages.

Fix: 

Fix popclient, I guess. :)
How-To-Repeat: 
	NFS mount /var/mail without root privs
	popclient <popserver>
	(see your mail disappear into neitherland)
